home_pill: 🏙️ Game city on the MafiaControl platform • since 2015
home_lead: Build your own mafia city, grow your empire, join a family and compete with other players.
announcement_text: The official Mafia Hunterss website is live and the Android app is available for download.
feature_city_text: After registration, every player builds their own mafia city.
feature_economy_text: Earn money, develop your background and strengthen your position.
feature_families_text: Join other players and create a strong mafia family.
feature_competition_text: Fight for respect and show who rules the underworld.
feature_languages_text: Czech, English, German, Polish and Slovak.
feature_android_text: Play comfortably through the mobile app.
available_languages_text: Mafia Hunterss is aimed at both Czech and international players.
footer_about: Mafia Hunterss is a game city running on the MafiaControl platform. Every player builds their own mafia city and grows their empire.
footer_project_text: Official website of the game city.
about_page_lead: Mafia Hunterss is a game city running on the MafiaControl platform since 2015.
about_what_text_1: Mafia Hunterss is a custom game city on the MafiaControl platform. It is not a standalone game engine, but a long-running project with its own community, website and Android app.
about_what_text_2: After registration, every player builds their own mafia city. They gradually develop their economy, gain respect, cooperate with others and compete for their position in the underworld.
about_princip_5: play in one of five languages.
download_lead: Download the official Mafia Hunterss Android app and launch the game with one click.
download_app_text: The new Android app works as a simple launcher for Mafia Hunterss. After clicking the Play Game button, the game opens in the default web browser.
download_preview_note: The image is currently from the beta version of the app.
download_feature_look_text: A simple and clean home screen.
download_feature_play_text: Quick game launch with one click.
download_feature_browser_text: Better compatibility with purchases and upgrades.
download_feature_display_text: The app is prepared for different screen sizes.
download_feature_fast_text: The app serves as a quick entry point into the game.
download_info_notice: The app is not distributed through Google Play. During installation, your phone may ask you to allow installation from unknown sources.
download_info_text: The app does not contain the game itself. It serves as a simple entry point that opens Mafia Hunterss in the default web browser.
download_planned_1: 📰 Display of the latest news directly in the app.
download_planned_3: 🔔 Notification about a new app version.
faq_a_1: Yes, the game can be played for free. Optional upgrades may be available in the game.
faq_q_2: What does the game run on?
faq_a_2: Mafia Hunterss is a game city running on the MafiaControl platform.
faq_q_3: Does the game have an Android app?
faq_a_3: Yes, the first version of the app is available on the Android page.
faq_q_4: What languages is the game available in?
faq_a_4: The website is available in Czech, English, German, Polish and Slovak.
contact_lead: Contact and links for the Mafia Hunterss project.
contact_support_text: Facebook, e-mail, Discord or other contacts will be added here later.
contact_support_tip: Tip: after setting up an e-mail, you can use for example support@mafiahunterss.eu.
